NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM STIPULATED ARB AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERDE PENINSULA FUND II, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR APR-15-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF VERDE PENINSULA FUND II, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM STIPULATED ARBITRATION AWARD IS ARGUED AND THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE PETITIONER FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE CALIFORNIA ARBITRATION ACT APPLIES TO THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE AN ARBITRATION AWARD THAT CAN BE CONFIRMED. PETITIONER'S REMEDY IS TO BRING AN ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT BASED ON THE STIPULATION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Confirm Stipulated Arb Award
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PAUL WINDUST, ESQ., 925.838.2090, FOR PETITIONER VERDE PENINSULA FUND II, LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: the court granted PLAINTIFF VERDE PENINSULA FUND II, LLC's Motion For Order To Confirm Stipulated Arbitration Award, Order signed in open court. judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Confirm Stipulated Arb Award
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF VERDE PENINSULA FUND II, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM STIPULATED ARBITRATION AWARD

Appearances: Daniel L. Rottinghaus and Paul W. Windust of Berding & Weil LLP (925.838.2090) for plaintiff and moving party; no other appearances.

Argued and the Court rules as follows: the motion is denied without prejudice. The petitioner fails to demonstrate that the California Arbitration Act applies to this case. Plaintiff failed to provide an arbitration award that can be confirmed. Petitioner's remedy is to bring an action for breach of contract based on the stipulation. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: E. Larnauti, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)
